data.title: Windward Ltd. Corrects Administrative Error in PDMR Dealing Notifications
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Windward Ltd. ( (GB:WNWD) ) has shared an update.

Windward Ltd. announced an amendment to several PDMR (Persons Discharging Managerial Responsibilities) dealing notifications. An administrative error led to an unawareness of automatic share sales by Matan Peled to cover tax liabilities from vesting Restricted Share Units. This announcement replaces previous details shared on multiple dates in 2024. The adjustments align with the UK Market Abuse Regulation.

More about Windward Ltd.

Windward Ltd. is a publicly-traded company on the London Stock Exchange, specializing in Maritime AI. The company provides AI-powered solutions that enable organizations such as banks, commodity traders, insurers, and major energy and shipping companies to make real-time, predictive decisions. Windward’s technology offers a comprehensive view of the maritime ecosystem, impacting safety, security, finance, and business operations.

YTD Price Performance: 41.32%

Average Trading Volume: 99,573

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: £104.6M

data.title: Euronet Worldwide Expands Credit Facility for Growth
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

The latest update is out from Euronet Worldwide ( (EEFT) ).

Euronet Worldwide has amended its unsecured revolving credit facility, raising the total amount from $1.25 billion to $1.9 billion and extending the maturity date to December 2029. This adjustment, supported by a syndicate of domestic and international financial institutions, enhances Euronet’s capital flexibility, allowing the company to pursue growth opportunities and deliver increased value to shareholders.

More about Euronet Worldwide

Euronet Worldwide, Inc. is a global leader in electronic payments and financial technology solutions, providing services such as money transfers, credit and debit card processing, ATMs, POS services, and foreign currency exchange. Operating in over 200 countries, Euronet has developed an extensive payments network including thousands of ATMs and POS terminals, serving diverse markets from its headquarters in Leawood, Kansas.

Current Market Cap: $4.48B

data.title: Metro Bank Strengthens Board with New Appointment
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Metro Bank ( (GB:MTRO) ) has issued an update.

Metro Bank has appointed Paul Coby as an independent Non-Executive Director, effective from December 30, 2024. Coby, a seasoned CIO with a distinguished record in digital transformation, brings valuable technology and leadership experience to the board. This appointment aims to strengthen Metro Bank’s board as it embarks on a new growth phase. The board, post-appointment, will consist of five independent Non-Executive Directors, three shareholder-nominated Non-Executive Directors, and two Executive Directors, marking a strategic enhancement in governance structure.

More about Metro Bank

Metro Bank is an independent UK bank known for its exceptional customer experience across retail, business, commercial, and private banking services. It offers various banking options through its 75 stores, UK-based contact centres, and award-winning mobile app. Established in England and Wales, the bank is celebrated for its service quality, having originated over £10bn in commercial lending. It has received multiple awards, such as ‘Large Loans Mortgage Lender of the Year’ and ‘Best Business Credit Card’. Metro Bank stands out for its commitment to inclusivity and diversity.

YTD Price Performance: 154.86%

Average Trading Volume: 1,562,393

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

data.title: Belships ASA to Accept Blue Northern Acquisition
data.description:
Belships ASA (DE:NS6) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Belships ASA has reached an agreement with Blue Northern BLK Ltd for a voluntary cash tender offer, valuing the company at approximately NOK 5.182 billion, with a 29.4% premium on its share price. The board unanimously recommends shareholders accept the offer, citing fair valuation and strategic growth opportunities. Major shareholders, holding 61.23% of shares, have committed to the offer, marking a significant move in the maritime investment landscape.

data.title: Mullen Automotive Seeks DOE Grant for Battery Expansion
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

The latest update is out from Mullen Automotive ( (MULN) ).

Mullen Automotive has submitted an updated plan to the U.S. Department of Energy seeking $55 million in grant funding for domestic battery materials processing. This plan includes using facilities in Mishawaka, Indiana, and Fullerton, California, to enhance U.S.-based battery production capabilities. The company has invested significant resources to advance its battery manufacturing operations, including strategic acquisitions and infrastructure improvements. Mullen aims to deliver its first production units by mid-2025 and has plans to launch additional production lines in subsequent years. These developments aim to strengthen Mullen’s position in the battery manufacturing industry and align with the DOE’s goals for clean energy and advanced U.S. manufacturing.

More about Mullen Automotive

Mullen Automotive is a Southern California-based company that specializes in manufacturing commercial electric vehicles (EVs). It operates two vehicle plants in Tunica, Mississippi, and Mishawaka, Indiana. The company offers the Mullen ONE, a Class 1 EV cargo van, and the Mullen THREE, a Class 3 EV cab chassis truck, both certified by the California Air Resource Board and the EPA. Mullen has expanded its commercial dealer network to seven dealers across key U.S. regions.

YTD Price Performance: -90.76%

Average Trading Volume: 3,449,720

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $11.65M

data.title: Albion Technology & General VCT PLC Announces Share Allotment Post-Merger
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

The latest announcement is out from Albion Technology & General VCT ( (GB:AATG) ).

Albion Technology & General VCT PLC announced the allotment of shares following its merger with Albion KAY VCT PLC. This transaction involved key figures such as Fiona Wollocombe, Swarupa Pathakji, and Simon Thorpe, all non-executive directors of the company. The shares, each with a nominal value of 1 penny, were traded on the London Stock Exchange at a price of £0.7133 per share. The transaction reflects the company’s strategic efforts to consolidate its market position and enhance its investment capabilities.

More about Albion Technology & General VCT

Albion Technology & General VCT PLC is a venture capital trust involved in technology and general investment sectors. The company focuses on providing equity and loan finance to support growth-oriented businesses across various industries.
